name: Palm Artificial Potted Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a touch of fuss-free greenery to your home with this Palm Artificial Potted Plant from Room Essentials™. This artificial arrangement features a realistic-looking palm tree, and it comes housed in a white melamine pot with faux soil filler for instant display. Place it on a side or console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
